user_query: Analyze the nutrition data for a dish containing chicken, broccoli, and quinoa and calculate the carbon footprint from a flight from Los Angeles to New York City.

TaskList.description: Gather nutritional information for chicken, broccoli, and quinoa.
Calculate the total nutritional values based on the gathered data.
Retrieve the carbon footprint data for a flight from Los Angeles to New York City.
Compile the analysis of nutritional information and carbon footprint data into a summary report.
